channel.title: SPL - Central Library
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Central Library

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Charla con el autor / Author Talk: Julio César Torres Hernández
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 1 / Piso 4 - Sala 1

El autor Julio César Torres Hernández presenta su libro bilingüe "Poemas que surgen del alma/Poems That Surge from the Soul".-------------------------------------------------------------------Author Julio César Torres Hernández presents his bilingual book, "Poemas que surgen del alma/Poems That Surge from the Soul."

Event details

item.title: ZAPP Zine Collection Winter Open Hours and Zine-Making Drop-In
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 7 Zine Room

Explore the ZAPP zine collection and/or join us for drop-in zine making.

Event details

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit
item.description:
Sunday, March 8, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Sunday, March 8, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: El Club Latino: "Las hijas del volcán"
item.description:
Sunday, March 8, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Piso 8 - Sala de reuniones

Participe en el Club de Lectura en español. El libro de este mes es "Las hijas del volcán" de Gina Maria Balibrera. Evento en español.

Event details

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit
item.description:
Monday, March 9, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Monday, March 9, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: AI Practitioner Part 4: Foundation Model Customization and Responsible AI
item.description:
Monday, March 9, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 3

In this AI foundational 6-part series, you will learn fundamental concepts and terminology related to artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, and generative AI.

Event details

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

Event details

item.title: Low Vision Book Group: "The Color of Water"
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 11:30 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 6

Join our Low Vision Book Club for a discussion of "The Color of Water" by James McBride.

Event details

item.title: Baby Story Time
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 1 - Story Hour Room in Children’s Center

At storytime, kids ages 0-18 months and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 1

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.مارس لغتك الإنجليزية.دینک نیرمت ار دوخ یسیلگنا.ئړک نیرمت يسیلګنا هلپخПрактикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: Resume Essentials
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 1:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 2

In this session you'll learn how to design a resume that highlights your skills, experience, and achievements to catch the attention of employers.

Event details

item.title: The Bullitt Lecture in American History presents Dr. Ned Blackhawk
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 1 - Auditorium

Join us to hear Dr. Blackhawk discuss the hidden history of 20th Century Native American activism.

Event details

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit
item.description:
Wednesday, March 11, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

item.title: Ladies Musical Club Concert
item.description:
Wednesday, March 11, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 1 - Auditorium

item.title: Disability Empowerment Center Outreach
item.description:
Friday, March 13, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 1 - LEAP Lab
